title: API Documentation
subtitle: Explore the LicenseVault REST API v1
baseUrlDesc: All API requests should be made to this base URL
authDesc: All API requests require a Bearer token using your API key. Include it in the Authorization header.
rateLimitsDesc: API requests are limited to 100 requests per minute per API key. Exceeding the limit returns a 429 status code.
tryItDesc: Enter your API key to test this endpoint
noApiKey: Enter an API key to test
webhooksDesc: Subscribe to real-time events by configuring webhook endpoints in your API settings.
webhookPayloadDesc: Webhook payloads are sent as JSON POST requests with the following structure
eventLicenseExpiredDesc: Triggered when a license reaches its expiration date
eventLicenseRenewedDesc: Triggered when a license is successfully renewed
eventInsuranceExpiredDesc: Triggered when an insurance policy expires
eventLicenseCreatedDesc: Triggered when a new license is added
eventLicenseUpdatedDesc: Triggered when license details are modified
manageApiKeysDesc: Create and manage API keys in your settings
licensesEndpoint: List all licenses in your organization
licenseDetailEndpoint: Get details for a specific license
projectsEndpoint: List all projects in your organization
